report_name: Major US Cement Producer Taps Aria Cybersecurity to Protect Critical Plant Operations

identities.name: Major US Cement Producer
identities.description: A major, unnamed US cement producer deploying the AZT PROTECT™ solution to secure its critical operational technology (OT) environments against cyberattacks like ransomware.

indicators.name: Blocked Executable by Application Whitelisting
indicators.pattern:
title: Blocked Executable by Application Whitelisting (AppLocker)
id: 2b9e1f0a-8c7d-4b6e-9f1a-3d2c1b0a9e8d
status: experimental
description: |
  Detects when an executable, script, or installer is blocked from running by Windows AppLocker (Event ID 8004).
  This can indicate an attempt to run unauthorized or malicious code, which is prevented by an application control solution like AZT PROTECT.
  A high volume of these events from a single host is highly suspicious.
references:
  - https://investingnews.com/aria-cybersecurity-secures-agreement-with-one-of-the-largest-us-cement-producers/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-23
modified: 2026-04-23
tags:
  - attack.execution
level: medium
logsource:
  product: windows
  service: applocker
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 8004
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects when an executable is blocked by an application whitelisting solution like Windows AppLocker, which can indicate attempted execution of unauthorized or malicious software in a secured OT environment.

indicators.name: PowerShell Execution Policy Bypass
indicators.pattern:
title: PowerShell Execution Policy Bypass
id: 5d1c3a9e-8b6e-4d7c-9f0a-1b2c3d0a9e8d
status: experimental
description: |
  Detects the use of PowerShell with the '-ExecutionPolicy Bypass' flag.
  This is a common technique used by adversaries to run malicious scripts on a system where the execution policy is otherwise restricted.
references:
  - https://investingnews.com/aria-cybersecurity-secures-agreement-with-one-of-the-largest-us-cement-producers/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-23
modified: 2026-04-23
tags:
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.execution
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\powershell.exe'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - ' -ExecutionPolicy Bypass '
      - ' -ep bypass '
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects attempts to bypass the PowerShell execution policy, a common technique for running unauthorized scripts, as mentioned in the article's hunting hints.
